The Problem

Your posture is getting worse every year

The average adult spends 10+ hours per day sitting. The result? Rounded shoulders, forward head posture, and chronic pain that compounds with every passing month.

  • 😣
    Chronic neck & shoulder pain

    Poor posture puts up to 60 lbs of extra pressure on your cervical spine. That's what's causing the ache.

  • 😴
    Constant fatigue & low confidence

    Slouched posture compresses your lungs by up to 30%, reducing oxygen and triggering mental fatigue and low mood.

  • 📉
    It gets worse if you do nothing

    Without intervention, postural damage is progressive. The muscles that should hold you up get permanently weaker every year.

  • 💸
    Physio doesn't fix the root cause

    Massage and physio give temporary relief. But without retraining the muscles, the problem always comes back.

Why ALIGNO™

Engineered to correct, not just support

Four principles that separate ALIGNO™ from every other posture brace on the market.

01

Instant Correction

Feel your shoulders draw back and your chest open the moment you put it on. Real, immediate improvement — not just compression or support.

02

Invisible Under Any Clothes

Ultra-slim figure-8 profile sits flush against your back. Completely undetectable under a t-shirt, dress shirt, or blouse.

03

Universal Fit

Dual Velcro buckles and adjustable shoulder loops fit chest sizes 25"–55". No size selection — one brace fits everyone.

04

Permanent Muscle Memory

With daily use, your muscles learn to hold the correct position automatically — even when ALIGNO™ is off. That's how real correction works.

The Process

Three steps to a straighter back

01

Put it on in 60 seconds

Slip your arms through the shoulder loops, cross the straps behind your back in a figure-8, and fasten the Velcro. No tools, no help needed. Comfortable from the first second.

⏱ Under 60 seconds
02

Wear 10–30 min/day

Start with 10 minutes. Mild muscle soreness means it's working — your corrector muscles are activating for the first time in years. Add 10 minutes each day.

⏱ Just 10 min to start
03

Stand straight automatically

Within 3–6 weeks your muscles develop memory for the correct position. You'll catch yourself standing straight — with or without ALIGNO™ on. That's the goal.

⚡ Lasting results in 3–6 weeks
💡 Pro tip

Most customers see their best results when they wear ALIGNO™ during a specific daily habit — morning coffee, commute, or first hour of work. The consistency is what builds lasting muscle memory.

FAQ

Your questions, answered

How long until I see real results? +
Most customers feel an immediate improvement in posture while wearing ALIGNO™. Lasting results — where your posture stays corrected without the brace — develop within 3–6 weeks of daily use (20–30 min/day).
What size do I need? +
ALIGNO™ is one size fits all. The fully adjustable figure-8 straps fit chest circumferences from 25 to 55 inches (60–140 cm). You don't need to pick a size.
Can I wear it under my clothes without it showing? +
Yes — that's exactly what it's designed for. The ultra-slim profile sits flush against your body and is undetectable under t-shirts, dress shirts, and blouses. Thousands of customers wear it at the office every day without anyone noticing.
Will it hurt? +
You may feel mild muscle soreness in the first 1–3 days — this is completely normal and means the brace is actively engaging your postural muscles. Start with 10 minutes and add time gradually. The discomfort fades quickly as your body adapts.
What if it doesn't work for me? +
We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee, no questions asked. Contact us within 14 days of delivery for a full refund. We've processed thousands of refunds without hassle — though our return rate is under 4%.
How fast will my order arrive? +
All orders are dispatched within 24 hours (Mon–Fri). Delivery typically takes 3–7 business days worldwide. You'll receive a tracking number by email immediately after dispatch.
Is it suitable for all body types? +
Yes. ALIGNO™ fits chest circumferences from 25" to 55" and works equally well for men and women. The figure-8 design adapts naturally to different body shapes. Over 50,000 customers across all body types have used it successfully.
